name: The 35th Chinese Chemical Society (CCS) Congress
description: Poster title: How Well AI Agents Perform as Expert Computational Chemists? Case Studies with Aitomia

images.caption: Receiving the best poster award at the 35th Chinese Chemical Society (CCS) Congress in Chongqing, China, April 2026.
Attended the CCS 35th meeting with my research group from Xiamen University, including my advisor Prof. Pavlo Dral (center).
Presenting my research on AI agents for computational chemistry at the CCS 35th meeting in April 2026.
